personal-list-width-description: When on, each user keeps their own list widths. When off, list widths are shared with everyone on the board.

fixed-list-width-note: When on, all lists have the same width, and resizing one list resizes all lists. This setting is only for you.

error-board-notAdmin: Ịkwesịrị ịbụ admin nke bọọdụ a iji mee nke ahụ
error-board-notAMember: Ịkwesịrị ịbụ onye otu bọọdụ a iji mee nke ahụ
error-notAllowed: Your board role is not allowed to do that
error-json-schema: Data JSON gị anaghị agụnye ozi kwesịrị ekwesị n'ụdị ziri ezi
error-csv-schema: CSV gị (ụkpụrụ ndị kewara rịkọm)/TSV (Tab Separated Values) anaghị agụnye ozi kwesịrị ekwesị n'ụdị ziri ezi.
error-import-empty-board: This export contains no board content (no swimlanes, lists or cards). It may have been created by an older WeKan version with a known export bug. Please re-export the board with the current version and import the new file.
error-user-notAllowSelf: Ị nweghị ike ịkpọ onwe gị
user-can-not-export-excel: Onye ọrụ enweghị ike mbupụ Excel
export-card-excel-fields: Họrọ ubi ị ga-etinye na mbupụ Excel:
export-card-field-people: Ndị mmadụ (Onye Okike, Onye nwe, ndị otu, ndị ekenyela)
export-card-excel-no-disk-space: Enweghị ike mbupụ na Excel: ezughị ohere diski efu
user-can-not-export-card-to-pdf: Onye ọrụ enweghị ike mbupụ kaadị na PDF
user-can-not-export-card-to-excel: Onye ọrụ enweghị ike mbupụ kaadị na Excel
filter-cards: Kaadị nzacha ma ọ bụ Ndepụta
filter-on-desc: Ị na-enyocha kaadị na bọọdụ a. Pịa ebe a iji dezie nzacha.
advanced-filter-description: Advanced Filter allows to write a string containing following operators: == != <= >= && || ( ) A space is used as a separator between the Operators. You can filter for all Custom Fields by typing their names and values. For Example: Field1 == Value1. Note: If fields or values contains spaces, you need to encapsulate them into single quotes. For Example: 'Field 1' == 'Value 1'. For single control characters (' \\/) to be skipped, you can use \\. For example: Field1 == I\\'m. Also you can combine multiple conditions. For Example: F1 == V1 || F1 == V2. Normally all operators are interpreted from left to right. You can change the order by placing brackets. For Example: F1 == V1 && ( F2 == V2 || F2 == V3 ). Also you can search text fields using regex: F1 == /Tes.*/i
import-board-instruction-kanboard: Paste a Kanboard export JSON: an object with "columns" (or tasks carrying column_name) and a "tasks" array (title, description, column_name, swimlane_name, date_due, owner, tags). Columns become lists and tasks become cards.
import-board-instruction-deck: Paste a NextCloud Deck board JSON (a board with "stacks", each stack carrying its "cards"). Stacks become lists and cards become cards.
import-board-instruction-openproject: Paste an OpenProject work-packages collection JSON (GET /api/v3/work_packages). Statuses become lists and work packages become cards.
import-board-instruction-issues: Paste a __sourceName__ issues JSON array (__endpoint__). Issues become cards grouped into Open / Closed lists.
import-board-instruction-asana: Paste an Asana tasks export JSON ({ "data": [...] } from the Asana export or GET /tasks). Tasks are grouped into sections (memberships); completed tasks go to Done.
import-board-instruction-zenkit: Paste a ZenKit list export JSON ({ "title", "stages":[...], "items":[...] }). Stages become lists and items become cards.
import-board-instruction-trello: N'ime bọọdụ Trello gị, gaa na 'NchNhr', wee 'Ọzọ', 'Bipụta na Mbupụ', 'Bupụ JSON', ma detuo ederede ga-apụta.
import-board-instruction-csv: Tapawa n'ụkpụrụ nkewa nkewa (CSV)/ Tab kewara uru (TSV) .
import-board-instruction-jira: Paste the JSON from the Jira Cloud REST API issue search (GET /rest/api/2/search), or an equivalent { "issues": [...] } object. Jira statuses become lists and issues become cards. Optionally include an "automationRules" array to import rules.
import-board-instruction-excel: Choose a WeKan-style .xlsx spreadsheet (the same columns as the Excel export: Title, Description, Status/List, Members, Labels, dates, custom fields). The first row is the header.
import-board-instruction-wekan: N'ime bọọdụ gị, gaa na 'NchNhr', wee 'Export Board', ma detuo ederede na faịlụ ebudatara.
import-board-instruction-about-errors: Ọ bụrụ na ịnweta mperi mgbe ị na-ebubata bọọdụ, mgbe ụfọdụ mbubata ka na-arụ ọrụ, bọọdụ dị na ibe bọọdụ niile.
import-json-placeholder: Tapawa data JSON gị bara uru ebe a
import-csv-placeholder: Tapawa data CSV/TSV gị bara uru ebe a
import-json-file: Or select a Trello JSON file
import-attachments-zip: Trello attachments ZIP (optional, from Trello Card Attachments Downloader)
import-trello-json-file-hint: One Trello board exported as .json. If you have saved Trello API key and token, its attachments, board background and member avatars are downloaded too.
import-trello-zip-file-hint: A .zip with one or more board .json files and their attachments in board-name subfolders (from the Trello Card Attachments Downloader). All boards are imported.
import-trello-zip-no-boards: No Trello board .json files were found in the .zip.
import-trello-zip-too-large: The .zip is too large to import.
import-trello-zip-too-many-files: The .zip has too many files to import.
import-trello-zip-file-too-large: A file inside the .zip is too large to import.
import-trello-zip-unsafe-path: The .zip contains unsafe file paths and was rejected.
import-trello-workspace-placeholder: Imported board is placed under this workspace, created if it does not exist
trello-api-import: Import directly from Trello with API key and token
trello-api-import-desc: Paste your Trello API key and token to list your Trello workspaces and boards, then import the selected ones with their attachments.
trello-api-token: Trello API token (manually generated below the API key)
trello-api-credentials-required: Please enter both the Trello API key and token.
trello-api-credentials-saved: Trello API key and token are saved. You can list workspaces without re-entering them.
trello-select-boards: Please select at least one board to import.
trello-cancel-delete-confirm: Cancel the import and delete the boards already imported by this job? This cannot be undone.
import-members-map: bọọdụ gị ebubatara nwere ụfọdụ ndị otu. Biko mapụ ndị otu ịchọrọ ibubata ndị ọrụ gị
import-members-map-note: Cheta na: A ga-ekenye ndị otu na-enweghị nkewa n'aka onye ọrụ ugbu a.
import-user-select: Họrọ onye ọrụ gị dị ugbu a ịchọrọ iji dị ka onye otu a

name: Aha

normal-assigned-only-desc: Naanị kaadị ekenyere ka a na-ahụ anya. Dezie ka onye ọrụ nkịtị.

notify-watch: Nweta mmelite na bọọdụ, ndetu ma ọ bụ kaadị ị na-ekiri

@PH2@@

Na koodu ịkpọ òkù gị bụ: @PH3@@

Daalụ.

dueCards-noResults-description: Ị nweghị kaadị nwere ụbọchị ruru ugbu a.
comment-not-found: Kaadị nwere nkọwa nwere ederede '%s' ahụghị.
operator-number-expected: onye ọrụ __operator__ tụrụ anya nọmba, nwetara '__value__'
operator-limit-invalid: %s abụghị oke mma.  Oke kwesịrị ịbụ ọnụọgụ dị mma.
globalSearch-instructions-description: Ọchụchọ nwere ike ịgụnye ndị na-arụ ọrụ iji mezie ọchụchọ ahụ.  A na-akọwapụta ndị na-arụ ọrụ site na ide aha onye ọrụ na uru nke eriri eriri kewapụrụ.  Dịka ọmụmaatụ, nkọwapụta onye ọrụ `list:Blocked` ga-amachi ọchụchọ ahụ na kaadị ndị dị n'ime ndepụta aha ya bụ * Gbochie*.  Ọ bụrụ na uru ahụ nwere oghere ma ọ bụ mkpụrụedemede pụrụ iche, a ga-etinyerịrị ya na akara ngụ (dịka `__operator_list__:"To Review"`).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-list: `__operator_list__:<title>` - ​​kaadị dị na listi dabara nke akọwapụtara *<title>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-swiml: `__operator_swimlane__:<title>` - ​​kaadị ndị dị n'ụgbọ mmiri dabara nke akọwapụtara *<title>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-label: `__operator_label__:<color>` `__operator_label__:<name>` - kaadị nwere akara dakọtara *<color>* ma ọ bụ *<name>
globalSearch-instructions-operator-user: `__operator_user__:<username>` - ​​kaadị ebe *<username>* bụ * onye otu* ma ọ bụ * onye ọrụ *
globalSearch-instructions-operator-creat: `__operator_creator__:<username>` - ​​kaadị ebe *<username>* bụ onye kere kaadị ahụ
globalSearch-instructions-operator-org: `__operator_org__:<display name|short name>` - ​​kaadị ndị nke otu bọọdụ e kenyere nhazi *<name>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-team: `__operator_team__:<display name|short name>` - ​​kaadị nke otu bọọdụ ekenyere otu *<name>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-due: `__operator_due__:<n>` - ​​kaadị ndị ruru ụbọchị *<n>* ụbọchị site ugbu a.  `__operator_due__:__predicate_overdue__ depụtara kaadị niile gafere ụbọchị ruru.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-creat: `__operator_created__:<n>` - ​​kaadị emepụtara *<n>* ụbọchị gara aga ma ọ bụ obere
globalSearch-instructions-operator-modif: `__operator_modified__:<n>` - ​​kaadị emeziri *<n>* ụbọchị gara aga ma ọ bụ obere
globalSearch-instructions-operator-statu: `__operator_status__:<status>` - ​​ebe *<status>* bụ otu n'ime ihe ndị a:
globalSearch-instructions-operator-has: `__operator_has__:<field>` - ​​ebe *<field>* bụ otu n'ime `__predicate_attachment__`, `__predicate_checklist__`, `__predicate_description__`, `__predicate_start__`, `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_end__`, `__predicate_assignee__` ma ọ bụ `__predicate_member__`.  Ịtụkwasị `-` n'ihu *<field>* na-achọ enweghị uru na mpaghara ahụ (dịka `has:-due` na-achọ kaadị na-enweghị ụbọchị ruru).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-sort: `__operator_sort__:<sort-name>` - ​​ebe *<sort-name>* bụ otu n'ime `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_created__` ma ọ bụ `__predicate_modified__`.  Maka ụdị na-agbada, tinye `-` n'ihu ụdị aha ahụ.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-limit: `__operator_limit__:<n>` - ​​ebe *<n>* bụ ọnụọgụ dị mma na-egosipụta ọnụọgụ kaadị a ga-egosipụta kwa ibe.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-1: Enwere ike ịkọwa ọtụtụ ndị ọrụ.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-2:
Ndị na-arụ ọrụ yiri nke ahụ bụ *OR*ed ọnụ.  A ga-eweghachite kaadị ndị dabara na ọnọdụ ọ bụla.
`__operator_list__:Available __operator_list__:Blocked` ga-eweghachi kaadị ndị dị na ndepụta ọ bụla aha ya bụ * akpọchiela * ma ọ bụ * Dị *.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3: Ndị ọrụ dị iche iche bụ * NA * ed ọnụ.  Naanị kaadị ndị dabara na ndị ọrụ niile dị iche ka a na-eweghachite.  `__operator_list__:Available __operator_label__:red` na-eweghachi naanị kaadị dị na listi * Dị* nwere akara * uhie*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3-2: Enwere ike ịkọwa ụbọchị dị ka ọnụọgụ dị mma ma ọ bụ adịghị mma ma ọ bụ iji `__predicate_week__`, `__predicate_month__`, `__predicate_quarter__` ma ọ bụ `__predicate_year__` maka oge dị ugbu a.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-5: Na ndabara, anaghị achọ kaadị echekwara.

server-error-troubleshooting:
Biko nyefee njehie nke ihe nkesa ahụ mepụtara.
Maka nrụnye snap, gbaa ọsọ: `sudo snap logs wekan.wekan`
Maka nrụnye Docker, gbaa ọsọ: `sudo docker logs wekan-app`

attachment-repair-locations-description: Find attachments and avatars whose recorded storage (filesystem / GridFS / cloud) no longer matches where the file is, and fix the database to point at the real location.
default-save-storage-description: Choose the storage backend where newly uploaded attachments are saved.
mongodb-compact-description: After moving files out of MongoDB GridFS, the database file on disk does not shrink automatically. Running Compact reclaims freed space by rewriting the collection data. Only run this after bulk file moves are complete.
mongodb-compact-warning: Warning: Compact is a blocking operation that may take several minutes on large databases. On replica sets, all secondaries are compacted first (automatically), then the primary. On single-node replica sets used for oplog (common Meteor setup), only the primary is compacted.
mongodb-compact-running: Running compact, this may take several minutes...

preview-pdf-not-supported: Ngwaọrụ gị anaghị akwado ịhụchalụ PDF. Gbalịa budata kama.
drag-board-to-workspace: Dọrọ bọọdụ iji kenye na __workspaces__ (dobe na ebe ọrụ na sidebar)
translation-number: Ọnụọgụ eriri ntụgharị asụsụ ahaziri ahazi bụ:
delete-translation-confirm-popup: Ị ji n'aka na ịchọrọ ihichapụ eriri ntụgharị asụsụ omenala a? Enweghị mmeghari.
editTranslationPopup-title: Dezie eriri ntụgharị asụsụ ahaziri ahazi
settingsTranslationPopup-title: Hichapụ eriri ntụgharị asụsụ omenala a?
import-board-zip: Tinye faịlụ .zip nke nwere faịlụ JSON bọọdụ, yana akwụkwọ ndekọ aha bọọdụ nwere mgbakwunye
support-info-only-for-logged-in-users: Ozi nkwado bụ naanị maka ndị ọrụ abanyela.
accounts-lockout-info: Ntọala ndị a na-achịkwa ka esi echebe mbọ nbanye pụọ na mwakpo ike ọjọọ.
accounts-lockout-known-users: Ntọala maka ndị ọrụ amaara (aha njirimara ziri ezi, paswọọdụ na-ezighi ezi)
accounts-lockout-unknown-users: Ntọala maka ndị ọrụ amaghị (aha njirimara adịghị adị)
accounts-lockout-locked-users-info: Akpọchiri ndị ọrụ ugbu a n'ihi ọtụtụ mbọ nbanye dara ada
accounts-lockout-no-locked-users: Enweghị ndị ọrụ akpọchiri ugbu a
accounts-lockout-confirm-unlock: Ị ji n'aka na ị chọrọ imeghe onye ọrụ a?
accounts-lockout-confirm-unlock-all: Ị ji n'aka na ịchọrọ kpọghee ndị ọrụ niile ekpochi?
accounts-lockout-click-to-unlock: Pịa ka ịkpọghee onye ọrụ a
admin-people-user-active: Onye ọrụ na-arụ ọrụ - pịa ka gbanyụọ ọrụ
admin-people-user-inactive: Onye ọrụ anaghị arụ ọrụ - pịa ka ịgbalite
add-cron-job-placeholder: Tinye arụmarụ ọrụ ahaziri ahazi na-abịa n'oge adịghị anya
board-archive-scheduled: Ahaziri ebe nchekwa bọọdụ nke ọma
board-backup-scheduled: A haziri nkwado ndabere nke bọọdụ nke ọma
board-cleanup-failed: Ịhazi oge mkpocha bọọdụ ada ada
cron-job-delete-confirm: Ị ji n'aka na ịchọrọ ihichapụ ọrụ a ahaziri?
cron-job-deleted: A kpochapụrụ ọrụ ahaziri nke ọma
cron-job-paused: Akwụsịchara ọrụ a haziri nke ọma
cron-errors-cleared: A kpochapụrụ mperi niile nke ọma
cron-no-failed-migrations: Ọnweghị mbugharị dara ada iji nwaa ọzọ
filesystem-enabled-description: Use local filesystem for file storage
s3-minio-storage-description: S3-compatible object storage: AWS S3, MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Wasabi, DigitalOcean Spaces and others.
s3-force-path-style-description: Required by MinIO and most non-AWS S3-compatible servers.
azure-connection-string-description: Optional: use a full connection string instead of account name and key.
gcs-key-filename-description: Optional: path to a service account JSON key file on the server.
gcs-credentials-description: Optional: paste the service account JSON key. Leave blank to use the key file or default credentials.
gcs-permissions-note: Give WeKan's service account read/write access to the bucket: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → your bucket → Permissions → Grant access. In "New principals", paste the service account email — the "client_email" value from your JSON key — then choose the role "Storage Object Admin" and Save.
cloud-secret-keep-blank: Leave blank to keep the current value.
azure-account-name-description: The name of your Azure Storage account.
azure-container-description: The blob container to store files in.
gcs-bucket-description: The name of the Cloud Storage bucket to store files in.
s3-endpoint-menu-path: AWS: leave blank (uses the region endpoint). S3-compatible: the Endpoint URL from your MinIO / Cloudflare R2 / Backblaze B2 / Wasabi / DigitalOcean Spaces console.
s3-region-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → your bucket → Properties → AWS Region.
s3-bucket-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → your bucket name (or Create bucket → Bucket name).
s3-access-key-menu-path: AWS Console → IAM → Users → your user → Security credentials → Access keys → Create access key → choose use case 'Application running outside AWS' → Create access key. Shown as 'Access key ID'.
s3-secret-key-menu-path: Same screen as the Access key ID; 'Secret access key' is shown only once when the key is created — copy it then (or Download .csv).
azure-account-name-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → name shown at the top (also under Security + networking → Access keys → Storage account name).
azure-account-key-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Show → Key.
azure-connection-string-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Connection string → Show.
azure-container-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → your account → Data storage → Containers → your container (or + Container to create one).
gcs-project-id-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → project selector at the top → your project's ID (Cloud overview → Dashboard → Project info → Project ID).
gcs-bucket-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → your bucket name (or Create to make one).
gcs-key-filename-menu-path: Path on the WeKan server to the downloaded service account JSON key file (created below). Use this OR paste the JSON into the field below.
gcs-credentials-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → IAM & Admin → Service accounts → your service account → Keys → Add key → Create new key → JSON → Create (downloads the file). Paste its contents here, or save the file and set its path above.
attachment-move-storage-azure: Move attachment to Azure Blob Storage
attachment-move-storage-gcs: Move attachment to Google Cloud Storage
gridfs-enabled-description: Jiri MongoDB GridFS maka nchekwa faịlụ
migration-stop-confirm: Ị ji n'aka na ị chọrọ ịkwụsị ọpụpụ niile?
gridfs-move-collectionfs-note: To have attachments and avatars visible, move them from CollectionFS to any other Storage.
s3-access-key-description: Igodo ohere AWS S3 maka nyocha
s3-bucket-description: Aha bọket S3 maka ịchekwa faịlụ
s3-enabled-description: Jiri AWS S3 ma ọ bụ MiniIO maka nchekwa faịlụ
s3-endpoint-description: URL njedebe S3 (dịka, s3.amazonaws.com ma ọ bụ minio.example.com)
s3-secret-key-description: Igodo nzuzo AWS S3 maka nyocha
s3-settings-saved: A na-echekwa ntọala S3 nke ọma
writable-path-description: Ụzọ ndekọ ntọala maka nchekwa faịlụ
comprehensive-board-migration-descriptio: Na-eme nyocha na ndozi zuru oke maka iguzosi ike n'ezi ihe data bọọdụ, gụnyere ịtụ ndepụta, ọkwa kaadị, na nhazi ụgbọ mmiri.
delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migration-d: Na-ehichapụ ndepụta oyiri efu na-enweghị nsogbu. Naanị wepu ndepụta na-enweghị kaadị NA nwee ndepụta ọzọ nwere otu aha nwere kaadị.
restore-lost-cards-migration-description: Chọta ma weghachi kaadị na ndepụta nwere swimlaneId ma ọ bụ listId na-efu. Na-emepụta ụzọ igwu mmiri 'kaadị furu efu' iji mee ka a hụ ihe niile furu efu ọzọ.
restore-all-archived-migration-descripti: Na-eweghachi ụgbọ mmiri, ndepụta na kaadị niile echekwara. Na-edozi swimlaneId ma ọ bụ listId ọ bụla na-efu na-akpaghị aka iji mee ka a hụ ihe.
fix-missing-lists-migration-description: Na-achọpụta ma rụkwaa ndepụta ndị na-efu ma ọ bụ mebiri emebi na nhazi bọọdụ.
fix-avatar-urls-migration-description: Na-emelite URL avatar maka ndị otu bọọdụ iji jiri ezigbo nchekwa ndabere wee dozie ntụnyere avatar gbajiri agbaji.
fix-all-file-urls-migration-description: Na-emelite URL mgbakwunye faịlụ niile dị na bọọdụ a iji jiri ezigbo nchekwa ndabere wee dozie ntụnyere faịlụ agbajiri.
migrations-admin-only: Naanị ndị nchịkwa bọọdụ nwere ike ịme njem
migrations-description: Gbaa nyocha na nrụzi data maka bọọdụ a. Enwere ike ịme njem ọ bụla n'otu n'otu.
run-comprehensive-migration-confirm: Nke a ga-eme njem njem zuru oke iji lelee ma dozie iguzosi ike n'ezi ihe data bọọdụ. Nke a nwere ike iwe obere oge. Gaa n'ihu?
run-delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migrati: Nke a ga-ebu ụzọ tụgharịa ndepụta ọ bụla ekekọrịtara ka ọ bụrụ listi swimlane, wee hichapụ ndepụta efu nwere ndepụta oyiri nwere otu aha nwere kaadị. Naanị ndepụta efu na-abaghị uru ka a ga-ewepụ. Gaa n'ihu?
run-restore-lost-cards-migration-confirm: Nke a ga-emepụta ụgbọ mmiri 'Kfuru efu' wee weghachi kaadị na ndepụta niile nwere swimlaneId ma ọ bụ listId na-efu. Nke a na-emetụta naanị ihe anaghị echekwaba. Gaa n'ihu?
run-restore-all-archived-migration-confi: Nke a ga-eweghachi ụgbọ mmiri, ndepụta na kaadị niile echekwara, mee ka a hụ ha ọzọ. A ga-edozi ihe ọ bụla nwere NJ na-efu efu. Enweghị ike ịmegharị nke a ngwa ngwa. Gaa n'ihu?
run-fix-missing-lists-migration-confirm: Nke a ga-achọpụta ma mezie ndepụta ndị furu efu ma ọ bụ merụrụ ure na nhazi bọọdụ. Gaa n'ihu?
run-fix-avatar-urls-migration-confirm: Nke a ga-emelite URL avatar maka ndị otu bọọdụ ka ha jiri ezigbo nchekwa azụ azụ. Gaa n'ihu?
run-fix-all-file-urls-migration-confirm: Nke a ga-emelite URL mgbakwunye faịlụ niile dị na bọọdụ a iji jiri nkwado ndabere ziri ezi. Gaa n'ihu?
restore-lost-cards-nothing-to-restore: Enweghị ụgbọ mmiri, ndepụta ma ọ bụ kaadị furu efu iji weghachi
migration-progress-note: Biko chere ka anyị na-akwaga bọọdụ gị n'ụdị kachasị ọhụrụ.
step-ensure-per-swimlane-lists: Gbaa mbọ hụ na Ndepụta Per-Swimlane
step-ensure-lost-cards-swimlane: Gbaa mbọ hụ na ịkwọ ụgbọ mmiri furu efu
conversion-info-text: A na-eme mgbanwe a otu ugboro n'otu bọọdụ ma na-emezi arụmọrụ. Ị nwere ike ịga n'ihu na-eji bọọdụ ahụ nke ọma.
converting-board-description: Ịtụgharị nhazi ụlọ maka ịrụ ọrụ ka mma. Nke a nwere ike iwe obere oge.
database-migration-description: Na-emelite nhazi nchekwa data maka ịrụ ọrụ na arụmọrụ ka mma. Usoro a nwere ike were nkeji ole na ole.
migration-batch-size-description: Ọnụọgụ nke mgbakwunye iji hazie na batch ọ bụla (1-100)
migration-cpu-threshold-description: Kwụsị ịkwaga mgbe ojiji CPU karịrị pasentị a (10-90)
migration-delay-ms-description: Ogbu oge n'etiti ogbe na millise seconds (100-10000)
migration-info-text: A na-eme mbugharị ọdụ data otu ugboro wee kwalite arụmọrụ sistemụ. Usoro a na-aga n'ihu n'azụ ọbụlagodi na imechi ihe nchọgharị gị.
migration-warning-text: Biko emechila ihe nchọgharị gị n'oge mbugharị. Usoro a ga-aga n'ihu na ndabere mana ọ nwere ike iwe ogologo oge iji wuchaa.
monitoring-refresh-failed: Ịmelite data nleba anya agaghị adị
search-boards-or-operations: Chọọ bọọdụ ma ọ bụ arụmọrụ...
account-locked: Akpọchiri akaụntụ nwa oge n'ihi ọtụtụ mbọ nbanye dara ada. Biko nwaa ọzọ ma emechaa.
invalid-credentials: Aha njirimara ma ọ bụ paswọọdụ ezighi ezi
username-too-short: Aha njirimara ga-abụrịrị opekata mpe mkpụrụedemede 3
account-created: Emepụtara akaụntụ! Ị nwere ike ịbanye ugbu a.
